# Falcore

> Falcore is a web design agency that builds high-performance websites for local businesses. Clean design, fast load times, and real results — delivered fast.

## Services
- Web Design & Development: custom-coded websites optimized for speed and conversions
- Conversion Rate Optimization: data-driven improvements to increase leads and bookings
- AI Automations: chatbots, lead capture, and workflow automation

## Process
Discovery call > Design mockups > Development > SEO setup > Launch > Ongoing support

## Contact

- Book a call: https://calendly.com/amirfaezansari/30min
- Website: https://falcoretech.com
